reviews.comment:
En el shop pedimos una promo con gaseosas linea coca, y solo habia coca cola, coca zero y acuarius pomelo (uno la compro pensando en tomar naranja, manzana o sprite). Y la linea de enchufes para cargar (que estan en las mesas) no andaban.

(Translated by Google)
At the shop, we asked for a promotion with Coca-Cola brand sodas, and they only had Coca-Cola, Coke Zero, and Aquarius grapefruit (I bought it thinking I'd get orange, apple, or Sprite). And the charging stations (on the tables) weren't working.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11465332764445308403/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURSeU1iMEhnEAE

reviews.comment:
Garantía de honestidad en la pureza del combustible. Muy cómodas instalaciones. Cumple las exigencias del ACA. Mención especial a la amabilidad de todos los que atienden.

(Translated by Google)
Guaranteed honesty in fuel purity. Very comfortable facilities. Meets ACA requirements. Special mention to the friendliness of everyone who serves.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11465332764445308403/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSdjUyNlhREAE
